description.value:
Receive Prescription processing script2 building blocks for patient M. van XXX_Noordman
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: KWAL script 2 Kwalificatie script 2: afhandelen medicatievoorschrift met acenocoumarol.
Receive Prescription processing script2 resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '856126') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '7323') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '20303') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '856126') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '7323') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '20303') ))).where((quantity.value = 40)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '856126|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ACENOCOUMAROL CF TABLET 1MG)
